title: Analog Horror Minecraft Music
description: Filters and down-sampling, plus some vinyl crackle, added to Minecraft's music for a creepy Analog Horror feel.
body:
I added a series of filters and down-sampling, and some nice warm vinyl crackle, to the original Minecraft music to give it a creepy analog horror feel. All credit to Microsoft, Mojang, C418, Lena Raine, Kumi Tanioka. Aaron Cherof, and Deadmau5 for the creation of the music. Feel free to use this in your modpacks!

There are two options:

Original (OG) - Just Minecraft's music, with my filters.

Extra Tracks (ET) - Adds four additional tracks; calm4, minecraft_02_test, minecraft_03_test, and mau5cave.

(If you don't recognize these track names, and are interested in some brief Minecraft history, [click here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/extra-tracks-history-restored))

Besides that, you can choose between the 1.19 or 1.20 resource pack version, or the version for the fantastic Reactive Music mod.

[Get Reactive Music by CircuitLord here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music)

Please let me know if you use my work in your content! I wanna watch it!
